description_long: This stereo sound system consists of a central subwoofer unit flanked by two smaller satellite speakers. The main subwoofer is a rectangular black box with a circular speaker opening on the front, accented by a red ring, and features a visible brand logo and several control buttons and indicator lights below the speaker. The satellite speakers are compact, also black, and are connected to the subwoofer by wires, with one power cord extending from the main unit. The rear of the subwoofer displays various input/output ports, labeled connection terminals, and a power switch, indicating its functionality for audio input and output. The surfaces of all components are smooth and matte, with the speaker grilles featuring a fine mesh pattern. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for placement on a desk, shelf, or entertainment center in an urban environment.
description: A modern black stereo sound system with a central subwoofer and two satellite speakers, featuring a red-accented speaker grille, control buttons, and multiple rear ports. The design is sleek and functional, with smooth matte surfaces and visible wiring.
description_view_0: Front view showing the subwoofer's circular speaker with a red ring, brand logo, control buttons, indicator lights, and both satellite speakers.
description_view_1: Side/rear view with the back of the subwoofer and one satellite speaker visible, highlighting the power cord and the plain side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying all input/output ports, labeled terminals, power switch, and the wiring connections for both satellite speakers.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view showing the other satellite speaker and the power cord, with minimal detail on the subwoofer's side.
attribute_brand_logo: A white 'AZtech' logo is visible on the front of the subwoofer, centered below the speaker opening.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles have a fine mesh pattern with small, evenly spaced perforations, and the subwoofer grille is accented by a red circular ring.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the lower front of the subwoofer, featuring several small round buttons, indicator lights, and a central knob, all arranged in a horizontal row.
